description: Screenshot-style graphic reproducing a Truth Social or X post from Donald J. Trump (@realDonaldTrump) on a white background. The top-left shows a circular avatar with Trump's face stylized as a U.S. flag (blue stars over one eye, red-and-white stripes), beside the bold black 'Donald J. Trump' name, a pink or magenta verified checkmark badge, a dark square Truth Social app icon, and the grey '@realDonaldTrump' handle below. The post body is set in large black sans-serif text reading verbatim: 'The Chancellor of Germany should spend more time on ending the war with Russia/Ukraine (Where he has been totally ineffective!), and fixing his broken Country, especially Immigration and Energy, and less time on interfering with those that are getting rid of the Iran Nuclear threat, thereby making the World, including Germany, a safer place! President DJT'.
notable_text: The Chancellor of Germany should spend more time on ending the war with Russia/Ukraine... and less time on interfering with those that are getting rid of the Iran Nuclear threat... President DJT
